commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the ACP parent stream relay so progress-mode parent channels default to relaying assistant commentary/status progress, then updates ACP docs and relay regression coverage for generic and Telegram parent channels.

PR surface: Source -1, Tests +18, Docs -1. Total +16 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main's relay passes a commentary default only for Discord, and the existing generic progress-mode regression expects no parent output. I did not execute tests because this was a read-only review.
